data.title: What's Going On With QuantumScape Stock Thursday?
data.description: QuantumScape Corp (NYSE:QS) shares are trading higher. The company on Thursday announced the advancement of its separator production process Cobra.

data.title: Why Trade Desk (TTD) Stock Is Up 8% This Week
data.description: Shares of Trade Desk are up 8% this week. The stock is higher following reports of a potential merger with streaming giant Roku.

data.title: Southwest Airlines Lifts Q4 Guidance, Launches $750 Million Stock Buyback
data.description: Southwest Airlines (LUV) to launch $750 million stock buyback program by Q1 2025. Revises Q4 guidance, expects RASM up 5.5-7.0% and lower capacity.

data.title: Footwear Firm Caleres Struggles in Q3, Cuts Annual Forecast Amid Sales, Margin Pressures
data.description: Caleres, Inc. (NYSE: CAL) reports Q3 results below expectations, with revenues of $740.9M and adjusted EPS of $1.23. Famous Footwear sales down 4.8% and company lowers FY24 guidance.

data.title: Build-A-Bear Boasts Strong Earnings: 'Most Profitable Q3 In Our History,' CFO Says
data.description: Build-A-Bear Workshop shares are trading higher after the company reported a third-quarter 2024 revenue growth of 11% year-over-year.
